title: erigeron × engadensis
intro: Erigeron × engadensis, also known as Alpine Fleabane, is a hybrid plant species within the daisy family, resulting from the cross between Erigeron alpinus and Erigeron aureus. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions. Alpine Fleabane is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating headaches, and promoting digestion. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to create teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
